popularStory.headline: Rodolphe Ier de Habsbourg (1218-1291)
popularStory.description: Rodolphe Ier du Saint-Empire ou Rodolphe IV de Habsbourg (1er mai 1218 – 15 juillet 1291) est roi des Romains de 1273 à sa mort. Il succède à Richard de Cornouailles et met fin à la période du Grand I …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Rudolf I von Habsburg於1218年5月1日出生在巴登阿赤 布萊薩賀薩斯巴賀 阿姆 凱澤斯圖爾利波格時，他的父親Albrecht IV von Habsburg26歲，母親Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg26歲。他於1251年與Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1273年被列為erster römisch-deutscher könig aus dem hause habsburg。他去世於1291年7月15日在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 格莫斯海姆享年73歲，埋葬在德國海藍-普法爾茲斯培也。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rudolf I von Habsburg于1218年5月1日出生在巴登阿赤 布萊薩賀薩斯巴賀 阿姆 凱澤斯圖爾利波格时，他的父亲Albrecht IV von Habsburg26岁，母亲Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg26岁。他于1251年与Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1273年被列为erster römisch-deutscher könig aus dem hause habsburg。他去世于1291年7月15日在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 格莫斯海姆享年73岁，埋葬在德国海藍-普法爾茲斯培也。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Rudolf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

variants.name: Rudolph
meanings: From a Latinized version, Rudolphus, of the Germanic name Hrōdwulf ( see Rolf ). It was introduced to the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century. Rudolf was a hereditary name among the Habsburgs, the Holy Roman Emperors and rulers of Austria, from the Emperor Rudolf I ( 1218–91 ) to the Archduke Rudolf , Crown Prince of Austria-Hungary, who died in mysterious circumstances at his country house at Meyerling in 1889 . Rudolf Rassendyll was the central character of Anthony Hope's adventure stories The Prisoner of Zenda ( 1894 ) and Rupert of Hentzau ( 1898 ), in which he is an English gentleman who bears a great physical resemblance to the King of Ruritania, to whom he is distantly related. He successfully impersonates the king for reasons of state. In the early 20th century the popularity of this name was further enhanced by the American silent-film actor Rudolph Valentino ( 1895–1926 ), born in Italy as Rodolfo di Valentina d'Antonguolla . It has not been used much in recent times, perhaps being inextricably associated with ‘the red-nosed reindeer’ of the Christmas song.

en.lifeSummary: When Rudolf I von Habsburg was born on 1 May 1218, in Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Breisach, Baden, his father, Albrecht IV von Habsburg, was 26 and his mother, Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg, was 26. He married Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg in 1251. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. In 1273, his occupation is listed as erster römisch-deutscher könig aus dem hause habsburg. He died on 15 July 1291, in Germersheim, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 73, and was buried in Speyer, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

fr.Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Bre: Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Breisach, Baden
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rudolf I von Habsburg est né le 1 mai 1218, à Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Breisach, Baden, son père, Albrecht IV von Habsburg, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg en 1251. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. En 1273, sa profession de son indiquée est erster römisch-deutscher könig aus dem hause habsburg. Il est décédé le 15 juillet 1291, à Landkreis Germersheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne.

de.Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Bre: Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Breisach, Baden
de.lifeSummary: Als Rudolf I von Habsburg am 1. Mai 1218 in Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Breisach, Baden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albrecht IV von Habsburg 26 und seine Mutter Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg 26. Er hat 1251 Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1273 ist sein Beruf als erster römisch-deutscher könig aus dem hause habsburg aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. Juli 1291 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Landkreis Germersheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland und wurde in Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolf I von Habsburg è nato il il 1 maggio 1218 nel Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Breisach, Baden, il suo padre, Albrecht IV von Habsburg, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg nel 1251. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Nel 1273, la sua occupazione è indicata come erster römisch-deutscher könig aus dem hause habsburg. Morì il 15 luglio 1291, nel Landkreis Germersheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Rudolf I von Habsburgが1218年5月1日にバデンアムト ブレイサチサスバチ アム ケイセルストゥhルリンバーグで生まれた時，父Albrecht IV von Habsburgは26歳，母Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburgは26歳であった。1251年にGertrud Anna von Hohenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。1273年，職業はerster römisch-deutscher könig aus dem hause habsburgと記録されている。彼は1291年7月15日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ジャーメルシェイムで73歳で死去し，ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズスペヤーにて埋葬された。

ko.Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Bre: 바든 아트 브레이작 사스바치 아 카이세르스툴 림버그
ko.lifeSummary: Rudolf I von Habsburg(이)가 1218년 5월 1일 바든 아트 브레이작 사스바치 아 카이세르스툴 림버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albrecht IV von Habsburg(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1251년 Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1273년, 그의 직업은 erster römisch-deutscher könig aus dem hause habsburg이었다. 그는 1291년 7월 15일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 그머셰임에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 스피어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rudolf I von Habsburg nasceu em 1 de maio de 1218, em Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Breisach, Baden, seu pai, Albrecht IV von Habsburg, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg em 1251. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Em 1273, sua profissão aparece como erster römisch-deutscher könig aus dem hause habsburg. Ele faleceu em 15 de julho de 1291, em Landkreis Germersheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha.

ru.Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Bre: лимбирг, сасбач ам кеисирстухл, амт брисач, баден
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rudolf I von Habsburg родился 1 мая 1218 г. в местности лимбирг, сасбач ам кеисирстухл, амт брисач, баден, его отцу по имени Albrecht IV von Habsburg было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg в 1251 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. В 1273 году он работал по профессии erster römisch-deutscher könig aus dem hause habsburg. Он умер 15 июля 1291 г. в местности ландкрис джирмиршим, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности спиир, раинланд-пфалз, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rudolf I von Habsburg nació el 1 de mayo de 1218, en Limberg, Sasbach am Kaiserstuhl, Amt Breisach, Baden, su papá, Albrecht IV von Habsburg, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Heilwig Gräfin von Kyburg, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg en 1251. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. En 1273, su ocupación registrada era erster römisch-deutscher könig aus dem hause habsburg. Murió el 15 de julio de 1291, en Landkreis Germersheim, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Speyer, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania.
